# GDMF - Graphic Device Minimalist Framework

## Files that must not be deleted

### packedbitmaps.h
Contains all 256 character glyphs for the text layer, packed at 2 bits per pixel (16×16px each).
**Generated by Edibima - do not edit by hand.** To update the typeface, open the source in Edibima and re-export this file.

### shaders/
The text layer shader toolchain. All files are load-bearing:

text.vert / text.frag : GLSL source - edit these to change shader behavior
text_vert.spv / text_frag.spv : Compiled SPIR-V - output of the bat scripts
text_vert.h / text_frag.h : Embedded C headers - included by gdmf_textlayer.c
vert.bat / frag.bat : Compile GLSL -> SPV, then convert SPV -> C header via xxd

### LEGACY/
These files exist only for reference and are no longer used in any part of the project. May be absent from repository:

gdmf_internal.h
gdmf_vulkan_command.h
gdmf_vulkan_command.c
gdmf_vulkan_device.c
gdmf_vulkan_device.h
gdmf_vulkan_pipeline.c
gdmf_vulkan_pipeline.h
gdmf_vulkan_renderloop.h
gdmf_vulkan_renderloop.c
gdmf_vulkan_shaders.c
gdmf_vulkan_shaders.h
gdmf_vulkan_sync.c
gdmf_vulkan_sync.h
